title: notobubon pungens
intro: Notobubon pungens, also known as the bitter buchu or short buchu, is a shrub native to South Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It is a popular medicinal plant due to its rich content of essential oils, particularly borneol, pinene, and camphor, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Notobubon pungens include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. Notobubon pungens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
